chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision Application No.S-23 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 28-10-2022 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for the Applicants. Mr. Abdul Hafeez Irfan, Advocate for legal heirs of deceased Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This Civil Revision Application is directed against the judgment and decree dated 09.01.2015, whereby learned 1st Additional District Judge, Sukkur while dismissing the Civil Appeal No.143 of 2010 (re: Federation of Pakistan and others v. M.A. Hakeem), maintained the judgment and decree dated 26.10.2010, whereby learned 2nd Senior Civil Judge, Sukkur decreed F.C. Suit No.49 of 2007 filed by the deceased predecessor of the respondents for damages, compensation and specific relief against the applicants. It is an admitted position that during pendency of instant Civil Revision Application, decree passed by the trial Court has been satisfied in Execution Application No.03 of 2015, which was allowed by the Executing Court vide order dated 03.05.2017. Leaned counsel for the applicants contends that the deceased predecessor of the respondents was not entitled for any compensation, damages, mental torture for malicious prosecution being employee of the applicants on the ground of his termination from service. After satisfaction of the decree, the aforementioned assertion of learned counsel for the applicants is mere an academic discussion. Accordingly, this Civil Revision Application on being infructuous stands dismissed. J U D G E Ahmad
